creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #59)

Conversation with upstream [1] indicates that the ungrab line was removed mainly because in linux it caused a 30-40 seconds delay and high CPU usage when switching from vty to Xorg in regrabbing the keys.

Could someone who has applied the change (adding back the ungrab) verify that this does not affect FreeBSD? We are a different OS than linux and our console is different, it's quite possible that the issue is not affecting us in the first place!


[1] https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/libxfce4ui/-/commit/85d8d390f9f2265613da4291992523937a7a2519
